# HookRate

> Score your hooks with AI. Get a score from 0 to 100 and 3 improved versions instantly.

HookRate is a web-based AI tool that scores short-form video hooks (the opening line of TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn videos) on a scale from 0 to 100. It analyzes 5 dimensions: curiosity gap, specificity, emotional tension, scroll-stopping power, and platform fit. Each analysis also generates 3 improved alternative hooks.

## Key Facts

- URL: https://hookrate.io
- Category: AI-powered content optimization tool
- Platforms supported: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn
- Pricing: Free (2 analyses/day) or Pro ($4.90/month for unlimited)
- Built by: @bencodezero

## Features

- AI Hook Score (0-100) based on 5 scoring dimensions
- 3 AI-generated improved alternatives per analysis
- A/B hook comparison (Pro)
- Score history and trends tracking
- Works in any language

## Scoring Dimensions

1. Curiosity Gap — Does the hook create an unanswered question?
2. Specificity — Are there concrete numbers or details?
3. Emotional Tension — Does it trigger an emotional response?
4. Scroll-Stopping Power — Would someone actually stop scrolling?
5. Platform Fit — Is the hook optimized for the selected platform?

## Content

- Blog: https://hookrate.io/blog/best-tiktok-hooks-2026
- Blog: https://hookrate.io/blog/hook-formulas
